arts.ttl: Liverpool could look to raid top-three PL side for 22-year-old after scouting him
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keeping tabs on the Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson. The 22-year-old is currently playing for Nottingham Forest and Liverpool have sent scouts to watch him in action. According to reports via GeordieBootBoys, Liverpool are keen on the highly rated midfielder. Nottingham Forest paid £35 million to sign the player and they are […] The post Liverpool could look to raid top-three PL side for 22-year-old after scouting him appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man United winger Alejandro Garnacho DEACTIVATES his X account hours before Liverpool clash after facing criticism and being axed by Ruben Amorim for derby win
arts.sum: Garnacho, 20, was left out entirely for the derby victory against Manchester City last month, alongside Marcus Rashford, and has been benched for the last four games.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Could Red Devils complete sensational £70m Victor Osimhen January deal?
arts.sum: Napoli forward Victor Osimhen is allegedly determined to secure a move to Manchester United before the January transfer window closes for business.
